subject: Invoice INV-2026-0004 – May IT Equipment & Services
preview: Please find attached our May invoice for IT equipment and professional services.
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached invoice #INV-2026-0004 covering IT equipment procurement and professional services for May 2026.

Total Amount: USD 28,640.00
Due Date: June 15, 2026

Kindly process payment at your earliest convenience. For any queries, please contact our billing department.

Best regards,
Apex Technology Solutions Billing Team
